nasb.text: Then Moses said to Aaron, “It is what the Lord spoke, saying, ‘By those who come near Me I will be treated as holy, And before all the people I will be honored.’ ” So Aaron, therefore, kept silent.

esv.text: Then Moses said to Aaron, “This is what the Lord has said: ‘Among those who are near me I will be sanctified, and before all the people I will be glorified.’” And Aaron held his peace.

cnv.text: 於是摩西對亞倫說：“這就是耶和華曾經告訴我們的，他說： ‘在親近我的人中，我要顯為聖， 在眾人面前，我要得榮耀。’” 亞倫就默然無語。

ccb.text: 摩西告诉亚伦：“耶和华曾说过，‘我要在事奉我的人中显明我的圣洁，在所有子民面前彰显我的荣耀。’”亚伦默默无言。
